fields.label: Global Company ID
fields.description: Refer to [plugin documentation](http://grafana.com/docs/plugins/grafana-adobeanalytics-datasource/#connection) for more information on where to find your Global Company ID in Adobe portal.

fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: OAuth2 Client ID for Adobe Analytics server-to-server authentication.

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth2 Client Secret for Adobe Analytics server-to-server authentication.

fields.label: Enable Secure Socks Proxy
fields.description: Enable proxying the datasource connection through the secure socks proxy to a different network.

groups.title: Connection
groups.description: Provide information to connect to the Adobe Analytics API.

groups.title: Authentication
groups.description: OAuth server to server authentication via https://ims-na1.adobelogin.com/ims/token/v3.
